summary: Frontend testing completed for ISO 20022 SWIFT Transfer Platform - Transaction Detail page with 27 document tabs. All features working correctly: Login, navigation, all 27 tabs render without errors, Back/Print/Send Email buttons functional.

issues: HTML hydration warning - span inside tbody element (React rendering issue, doesn't affect functionality)

critical_code_review_comments: Code structure is well-organized - TransactionDetail.jsx split into modular components in /app/frontend/src/components/documents/
All 27 tabs have proper data-testid attributes for testing
DocHelpers.jsx provides reusable components (DocWrap, IsoLogo, DocBanner, FieldRow, etc.)
TxnSummary component in BriefDocuments.jsx provides consistent transaction details across all brief tabs

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All 27 tabs render correctly, all buttons functional

context_for_next_testing_agent: Transaction Detail page at /transactions/{id} has 27 document tabs. All tabs render correctly with ISO 20022 branding. The 4 main tabs (Settlement Letter, SWIFT Confirmation, Global Status, Alliance Report) match PDF template requirements. The 23 brief tabs show complete transaction details using shared TxnSummary component.
passed_tests: Clicking transaction row opens detail page
All 27 document tabs render without errors:
- Settlement Letter: ISO logo, banner, transaction references, participating institutions, settlement confirmation, checkmarks, customer details
- SWIFT Confirmation: participating banks, settlement details, nostro/vostro status, multi-level confirmations, IP table
- Global Status: system info, message identification, participating institutions, nostro/vostro movement
- Alliance Report: report header, message header, XML message text, report footer
- MT202 COV: message fields, cover sequence
- MT103 Answer Back: answer back details
- Server Report: processing log, server metrics
- Fund Location: current location, location history
- MT900 Debit: debit confirmation with amount display
- MT910 Credit: credit confirmation with amount display
- Nostro Account Detail: nostro/vostro account info, reconciliation status
Send Email dialog opens and closes correctly
Tab switching works across all 27 tabs

mocked_apis.POST /api/transactions/{id}/send-notific: Email notification endpoint is MOCKED (returns success without actual email)
